typeProperties.script:
parameters{
	varEndYear as integer (),
	varOTables as string (),
	varStartYear as integer (),
	var_batches as string (),
	var_batch_nbr as integer (),
	var_log_path as string (),
	var_fzg_fnln_row_score as decimal(10,0) (),
	var_fzl_fnln_row_score as decimal(10,0) (),
	var_fzl_fn_row_score as decimal(10,0) (),
	var_fzl_ln_row_score as decimal(10,0) (),
	Var_log_path as string ()
}

source(output(
		{} as integer
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	isolationLevel: 'READ_UNCOMMITTED',
	query: 'SELECT   P1.row_id   ,MSP.row_id                                      AS master_row_id   ,hosp_patient_nbr   ,P1.phn   ,CAST(P1.phn_clean+\'-A\'+LTRIM(RTRIM(STR(P1.row_nbr))) as varchar(30)) AS phn_clean   ,P1.name_first_middle   ,1                                               AS first_name_score   ,name_first   ,name_last   ,1                                               AS last_name_score   ,P1.name_first_middle_clean   ,P1.name_last_clean   ,P1.birth_date   ,P1.gender   ,aka_name   ,1                                               AS row_score   ,dupe_count   ,julian_month   ,patient_nbr   ,street_addr1   ,street_addr2   ,city   ,province   ,postal_code   ,phone_number   ,P1.data_source   ,P1.phn_clean                                    AS master_phn   ,MSP.name_last_clean                             AS master_name_last   ,MSP.name_first_middle_clean                     AS master_name_first_middle   ,MSP.birth_date                                  AS master_birth_date   ,MSP.gender                                      AS master_gender   ,MSP.data_source                                 AS master_data_source   ,NULL                                            AS [mark]   ,\'A\'                                             AS original_match_code   ,\'A\'                                             AS new_match_code   ,40007                                             AS stage_id FROM [ecms].[tmp_patient_stg2] P1   INNER JOIN (SELECT 				phn_clean+\'-A\'+LTRIM(RTRIM(STR(row_nbr)))                                                                      AS phn_clean 				,name_last_clean 				,name_first_middle_clean 				,birth_date 				,gender 				,data_source 				,row_id 				,ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY phn_clean+\'-A\'+LTRIM(RTRIM(STR(row_nbr))) ORDER BY julian_month DESC, patient_nbr DESC) rank_nbr 			  FROM 				[ecms].[tmp_patient_stg2] 			  WHERE  [mark]=2) MSP 	ON P1.phn_clean+\'-A\'+LTRIM(RTRIM(STR(P1.row_nbr)))=MSP.phn_clean WHERE  [mark]=2    AND MSP.rank_nbr=1  UNION ALL SELECT    P1.row_id   ,P1.row_id                                      AS master_row_id   ,hosp_patient_nbr   ,P1.phn     ,P1.phn_clean   ,P1.name_first_middle   ,1                                               AS first_name_score   ,name_first   ,name_last   ,1                                               AS last_name_score   ,P1.name_first_middle_clean   ,P1.name_last_clean   ,P1.birth_date   ,P1.gender   ,aka_name   ,1                                               AS row_score   ,dupe_count   ,julian_month   ,patient_nbr   ,street_addr1   ,street_addr2   ,city   ,province   ,postal_code   ,phone_number   ,P1.data_source   ,P1.phn_clean                                    AS master_phn   ,P1.name_last_clean                             AS master_name_last   ,P1.name_first_middle_clean                     AS master_name_first_middle   ,P1.birth_date                                  AS master_birth_date   ,P1.gender                                      AS master_gender   ,P1.data_source                                 AS master_data_source   ,NULL                                            AS [mark]   ,\'A\'                                             AS original_match_code   ,\'A\'                                             AS new_match_code   ,40007                                           AS stage_id FROM [ecms].[tmp_patient_stg2] P1 WHERE  [mark] IS NULL;',
	format: 'query',
	staged:false) ~> src
src sink(input(
		last_name_score as integer,
		master_data_source as string,
		gender as string,
		dupe_count as short,
		city as string,
		birth_date as date 'dd-MM-yyyy',
		julian_month as short,
		street_addr1 as string,
		street_addr2 as string,
		name_last as string,
		original_match_code as string,
		aka_name as string,
		province as string,
		master_birth_date as date 'dd-MM-yyyy',
		master_name_last as string,
		phn_clean as string,
		patient_nbr as integer,
		name_first as string,
		master_phn as string,
		master_name_first_middle as string,
		first_name_score as integer,
		master_gender as string,
		stage_id as integer,
		row_score as integer,
		data_source as string,
		new_match_code as string,
		master_row_id as string,
		hosp_patient_nbr as string,
		phn as string,
		phone_number as string,
		row_id as string,
		postal_code as string,
		name_first_middle as string,
		mark as short
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	stagingSchemaName: 'dbo',
	saveOrder: 10000,
	insertable:true,
	deletable:false,
	upsertable:false,
	updateable:false,
	keys:[],
	mapColumn(
		last_name_score,
		master_data_source,
		gender,
		dupe_count,
		city,
		birth_date,
		julian_month,
		street_addr1,
		street_addr2,
		name_last,
		original_match_code,
		aka_name,
		province,
		master_birth_date,
		master_name_last,
		phn_clean,
		patient_nbr,
		name_first,
		master_phn,
		master_name_first_middle,
		first_name_score,
		master_gender,
		stage_id,
		row_score,
		data_source,
		new_match_code,
		master_row_id,
		hosp_patient_nbr,
		phn,
		phone_number,
		row_id,
		postal_code,
		name_first_middle,
		mark)) ~> destptalternateset
